idf.py build
idf.py flash
idf.py monitor

D:\work_tdeck2\lcd>idf.py monitor
Executing action: monitor
Serial port COM87
Connecting...
Detecting chip type... ESP32-S3
Running idf_monitor in directory D:\work_tdeck2\lcd
